description: TextCodecConvertAssetComponent — convert text between codecs (ASCII↔EBCDIC, etc.).

mode.label: Mode
mode.description: `string`: convert a column of Python str values in place. `file`: read each file path's bytes, recode, write a new file.

from_codec.label: From Codec
from_codec.description: Source codec name (Python stdlib codec). Common EBCDIC: cp037, cp1140, cp273, cp500, cp1047.

errors.label: Errors
errors.description: Behavior on un-encodable / un-decodable characters. `replace` substitutes `?` / `\ufffd` — useful for non-strict ETL.

source_column.label: Source Column
source_column.description: mode='string': column of str values to convert. Required for string mode.

target_column.label: Target Column
target_column.description: mode='string': new column to write the result into. If equal to `source_column`, overwrites in place. Default: source_column.

source_path_column.label: Source Path Column
source_path_column.description: mode='file': column of input file paths. Required for file mode.

output_dir.label: Output Dir
output_dir.description: mode='file': directory to write output files into.

output_filename_template.label: Output Filename Template
output_filename_template.description: mode='file': filename template (no dir). Supports `{<column>}` + `{row_index}`. Default: <basename>_<to_codec>.<orig_ext>.

output_path_column.label: Output Path Column
output_path_column.description: mode='file': column to write the output file path into.

name: Text Codec Convert Asset
